sh. In the
same manner, the prediction of abortion should be made at a query
regarding a pregnant woman, i.e. if there arc evil omens at the
time of consultation, miscarriage has to be predicted.

At a query regarding the sex of the child to be born, if a man
is seen, inferred, present in front or touched, the birth of a male
child should be predicted ; if it is a woman that is seen etc. that of
a female child ; and if it is a eunuch or one having a neuter name,
a eunuch's birth is to be predicted. The child-birth will be easy
and happy, if some drink, food, fruit or Power is seen at the
time.
trsyti* ^nrc *n CRT ^nrT I
u^vau
If a woman touches with her thumb her eye-brow, stomach
or finger at a query, she must be thinking of pregnancy. The same
prediction should be made when honey, ghee and such other things
(i.e good fruits, things having masculine names) or gold, gems
